queries: E2E pipeline Optimizing Storage Costs and Performance 2023 2024
action.query: E2E pipeline Optimizing Storage Costs and Performance 2023 2024

annotations.title: Optimizing Our E2E Pipeline | Engineering at Slack
AI Pipeline Optimization on Xeon® Processors | Intel®
Best practices for Dataflow cost optimization  |  Google Cloud
Optimizing cost in your CI/CD pipeline
Best practices for Dataflow cost optimization  |  Google Cloud
Towards Optimizing Storage Costs on the Cloud
How to Develop Efficient E2E Pipelines - HogoNext
Architecting and E2E IMSS Pipeline | Springer Nature Link

content.text:
Optimizing storage costs and performance in end-to-end (E2E) pipelines is crucial for enhancing efficiency and reducing operational expenses. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that provide valuable insights into this topic:

1. **Slack's E2E Pipeline Optimization**: Slack's Developer Experience (DevXP) team implemented significant optimizations to their E2E testing pipeline, achieving a 60% reduction in frontend build frequency and a 50% decrease in overall build time. These enhancements streamlined their continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) process, allowing engineers to iterate more rapidly and efficiently. ([slack.engineering](https://slack.engineering/speedup-e2e-testing/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Intel's AI Pipeline Optimization**: Intel discusses strategies for optimizing AI pipelines on Xeon processors, focusing on AI software acceleration, system-level tuning, hyperparameter and runtime parameter optimizations, and workflow scaling. These strategies aim to improve user productivity and workload performance efficiency across various E2E pipelines. ([intel.com](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/developer/articles/technical/optimizing-end-to-end-ai-pipelines.html?utm_source=openai))

3. **Google Cloud's Dataflow Cost Optimization**: Google Cloud provides best practices for optimizing Dataflow jobs to minimize costs. Key recommendations include defining service level objectives (SLOs), monitoring jobs using Dataflow's monitoring tools, and employing techniques like running smaller jobs on subsets of data to estimate costs and exporting Cloud Billing data to BigQuery for cost analysis. ([cloud.google.com](https://cloud.google.com/dataflow/docs/optimize-costs?utm_source=openai))

4. **Optimizing CI/CD Pipeline Costs**: This article discusses practical strategies to optimize costs within CI/CD pipelines while ensuring high quality and performance. It emphasizes understanding cost drivers, such as cloud resource usage and licensing fees, and implementing cost-saving measures without compromising on quality. ([oneringci.com](https://www.oneringci.com/post/optimizing-cost-in-your-ci-cd-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

5. **Best Practices for Dataflow Cost Optimization**: Google Cloud outlines best practices for optimizing Dataflow jobs to minimize costs. Recommendations include defining service level objectives (SLOs), monitoring jobs using Dataflow's monitoring tools, and employing techniques like running smaller jobs on subsets of data to estimate costs and exporting Cloud Billing data to BigQuery for cost analysis. ([cloud.google.com](https://cloud.google.com/dataflow/docs/optimize-costs?utm_source=openai))

6. **Optimizing Storage Costs on the Cloud**: This research paper presents an optimizer that optimizes data placement tiers and compression schemes to reduce storage and access costs on the cloud. It also introduces access pattern-aware data partitioning to optimize partition sizes and reading costs, achieving significant cost savings compared to platform baselines. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.14818?utm_source=openai))

7. **Developing Efficient E2E Pipelines**: This article outlines principles for creating efficient E2E pipelines, including atomic and idempotent operations, parallelization and concurrency, fast feedback loops, and deterministic environments. These principles aim to enhance reliability, maintainability, and resource optimization in pipeline development. ([hogonext.com](https://hogonext.com/how-to-develop-efficient-e2e-pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

8. **Architecting and E2E IMSS Pipeline**: This chapter discusses fundamental data pipeline elements, including storage, display, and analytics, emphasizing the importance of data storage to meet legal and insurance requirements and provide retrospective access for analysis. ([link.springer.com](https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-1-4842-8297-7_3?utm_source=openai))

These sources offer a comprehensive understanding of strategies and best practices for optimizing storage costs and performance in E2E pipelines.
